results.name: Monobit Frequency
results.summary: Checks overall 0/1 balance in the sampled bitstream

results.name: Byte Frequency Distribution
results.summary: Checks how close the 0..255 byte histogram is to uniform

results.name: Runs Test
results.summary: Measures whether bit transitions happen at a plausible rate

results.name: Autocorrelation Lag 1
results.summary: Computes bit-level autocorrelation at lag 1

results.name: Autocorrelation Lag 8
results.summary: Computes bit-level autocorrelation at lag 8

results.name: Autocorrelation Lag 64
results.summary: Computes bit-level autocorrelation at lag 64

results.name: Serial Correlation Lag 1
results.summary: Computes byte-level serial correlation at lag 1

results.name: Serial Correlation Lag 8
results.summary: Computes byte-level serial correlation at lag 8

results.name: Serial Correlation Lag 32
results.summary: Computes byte-level serial correlation at lag 32

results.name: Shannon Entropy Per Byte
results.summary: Measures information density per byte

results.name: Compression Test
results.summary: Random-looking output should not compress much under zlib

results.name: Next-Bit Prediction Test
results.summary: Uses a simple 8-bit context predictor against held-out bits

results.name: Forward Prediction Resistance
results.summary: Checks whether a full live-state clone can predict future output

results.name: State Recovery Attack Proxy
results.summary: Treats a serializable state snapshot as a full-compromise scenario

results.name: Backtracking Resistance
results.summary: No reverse-state proof is available; this suite cannot certify backtracking resistance

metrics.note: Custom deterministic generators generally fail this unless the state transition is one-way under compromise.

results.name: Distinguishability Test
results.summary: Tries to classify this generator versus OS randomness using cheap statistical features

results.name: Time-Memory Tradeoff Proxy
results.summary: Looks for prefix collisions across nearby seeds as a coarse precomputation proxy

results.name: Correlation Attack
results.summary: Checks whether closely related seeds emit strongly correlated output streams

results.name: Linear Complexity Test
results.summary: Runs Berlekamp-Massey on the leading bitstream

results.name: Bit-Level Linearity Probe
results.summary: Uses nearby seed variants to see whether output differences superimpose too cleanly

results.name: State Transition Collision Probe
results.summary: Samples live state fingerprints to look for short transition collisions

results.name: Low-Degree Polynomial Probe
results.summary: Measures whether paired seed perturbations collapse into unusually simple output relations

results.name: Differential Cryptanalysis-Style Probe
results.summary: Measures how output differences spread under nearby seed perturbations

results.name: Bias Amplification Over Iterations
results.summary: Tracks monobit bias across successive chunks

results.name: State Space Size Estimation
results.summary: Estimates mutable state size from integer state words that are directly visible

results.name: Cycle Detection (Floyd)
results.summary: Uses state fingerprints with Floyd cycle detection to search for short cycles

results.name: Period Estimation / State Collision
results.summary: Looks for repeated state fingerprints within the test window

results.name: Repeat Pattern Detection
results.summary: Searches for repeated 16-byte blocks in the sampled output

results.name: Lyapunov-Like Divergence
results.summary: Estimates divergence growth between nearby seeds from output Hamming distance

results.name: Initial Condition Sensitivity
results.summary: Checks whether a tiny seed change leads to about half the output bits flipping

results.name: Topological Mixing / Phase Space
results.summary: Measures lag-plot occupancy and correlation between successive normalized words

results.name: Entropy Growth Over Iterations
results.summary: Tracks per-chunk byte entropy through the early output stream

results.name: Bifurcation Sensitivity Test
results.summary: Treats nearby seed perturbations as parameter nudges and measures output divergence

results.name: Avalanche Effect
results.summary: Checks whether a minimal seed change flips about half the output bits

results.name: Bit Flip Sensitivity
results.summary: Measures sensitivity to flipping a higher-value bit in the seed

results.name: Similar Seed Correlation
results.summary: Checks whether transformed but related seeds produce correlated streams

results.name: Rotation / Transformation Robustness
results.summary: Measures whether structured seed transformations still trigger strong output changes

results.name: Perturbation Sequence Sensitivity
results.summary: Uses seed shifts as a proxy for perturbation-sequence reordering

results.name: Seed Collision Resistance
results.summary: Checks for identical 16-byte prefixes across nearby seed variants

results.name: Input Difference to Output Difference Ratio
results.summary: Compares output divergence against seed-bit distance

results.name: Differential Distribution Uniformity
results.summary: Looks at the byte distribution of XOR differences between nearby seeds

results.name: Output XOR Distribution
results.summary: Checks whether XOR differences between similar seeds show obvious correlation

results.name: Sensitivity to Sequence Shifts
results.summary: Measures sensitivity to ordered-seed shifts

results.name: Bit Independence Test
results.summary: Measures correlation between adjacent output bits

results.name: Avalanche on Internal State to Output
results.summary: Flips one visible state bit and measures output avalanche

results.name: Bias After Extraction
results.summary: Checks low-bit and high-bit bias after the output function

results.name: Whitening Effectiveness
results.summary: Compares a naive raw-state fold against the public output function

results.name: Floating-Point Precision Degradation
results.summary: Checks whether the visible generator state still relies on floating-point values

results.name: Cross-Platform Reproducibility Fingerprint
results.summary: Emits a canonical output digest you can compare across machines

results.name: Determinism Check
results.summary: Checks whether two fresh generators with the same seed match exactly

results.name: Warmup Effectiveness
results.summary: Compares warmed output entropy to zero-warmup output entropy

results.name: Performance Benchmark
results.summary: Measures one-shot throughput for byte generation

results.name: Neural Network Prediction Test
results.summary: A full neural-network predictor is not implemented unless scikit-learn or a DL stack is installed

results.name: Regression-Based Prediction
results.summary: Fits a tiny linear regressor on previous bytes to predict the next byte

results.name: Sequence Classification
results.summary: Uses cheap feature vectors to classify this generator against OS randomness

results.name: Hidden State Reconstruction Proxy
results.summary: Uses a linear model on visible state words to predict the next low output byte as a reconstruction proxy
